What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a white double-breasted chef's coat stands on a dark patterned mat over a white tiled floor. They manipulate dough on a white countertop surface while a white cylindrical bucket sits on the right side and a small white shaker bottle remains on the left. The individual wipes the counter with a beige cloth and moves dough balls near the bucket on the surface.
